articles.title: Nvidia RTX 3060 comeback in 2026 could alleviate soaring GPU prices and memory shortages — rumored RTX 5050 9GB abruptly shelved amid speculation
articles.summary: If relaunched at the right price, the RTX 3060 could re-enter the market as a viable option in a segment facing increasing cost pressures.
articles.title_zh: Nvidia RTX 3060 有望於 2026 年回歸市場，可紓解 GPU 價格飆升與記憶體短缺問題——傳聞 RTX 5050 9GB 突然擱置
articles.summary_zh: 若以適當價格重新推出，RTX 3060 可望作為面臨成本壓力不斷增加的市場區隔中的可行選項重返市場。

articles.title: Nvidia RTX 5070 Ti gaming laptop is on sale for 19% off — MSI's Vector 16 has a 144 Hz screen, and comes with Pragmata for free
articles.summary: MSI has put its Vector 16 gaming laptop on sale for just $1,529 at Newegg, offering a solid discount for a beastly hardware combo. You get a Core Ultra 7 255HX paired with a 140W RTX 5070 Ti, 16GB of RAM, and a 512GB SSD, all of which are upgradeable. All that is backed up by a 90 Wh battery and displayed on a 144 Hz FHD+ screen.
articles.title_zh: Nvidia RTX 5070 Ti 遊戲筆電便宜 19% 折扣熱銷中——MSI Vector 16 搭載 144 Hz 螢幕，更附贈 Pragmata 遊戲
articles.summary_zh: MSI 將其 Vector 16 遊戲筆電在 Newegg 上促銷至 $1,529，搭載 Core Ultra 7 255HX、140W RTX 5070 Ti、16GB RAM 和 512GB SSD 等配置，所有組件皆可升級。

articles.title: MacBook Neo has a chip supply problem, here’s how Apple could fix it
articles.summary: Apple has a chip problem. MacBook Neo is selling far better than the company had expected , and now it seems like there aren’t enough binned A18 Pro chips to keep the production run going for another 6-12 months before a new version is released. Some have floated the idea of Apple axing the 256GB trim, and just using an unbinned A18 Pro chip in the 512GB trim. That’s certainly plausible. I do wonder though, how can Apple prevent this from happening with every forthcoming MacBook Neo? more…
articles.title_zh: MacBook Neo 面臨晶片供應問題，Apple 可以這樣解決
articles.summary_zh: MacBook Neo 的銷售超乎 Apple 預期，但 A18 Pro 晶片供應不足，可能無法維持未來 6-12 個月的生產。

articles.title: Here are all of the new Apple products worth waiting for, and what to avoid buying now
articles.summary: Apple has already unveiled numerous products to date, including new versions of the MacBook Air and MacBook Pro, the iPad Air, the all-new MacBook Neo, and more. Despite having a busy season thus far, there’s still much more in the pipeline worth waiting for. more…
articles.title_zh: 值得等待的 Apple 新產品大全，以及現在應避免購買的產品
articles.summary_zh: Apple 已發佈 MacBook Air、MacBook Pro、iPad Air 和 MacBook Neo 等多款新產品，未來還有更多值得期待的產品。

articles.title: Indie App Spotlight: ‘QuakeInfo’ is a fast and easy way to monitor ongoing earthquakes
articles.summary: Welcome to Indie App Spotlight . This is a weekly 9to5Mac series where we showcase the latest apps in the indie app world. If you’re a developer and would like your app featured, get in contact . If you live in a earthquake-prone climate, you might be interested in a tool to help monitor them. QuakeInfo is a long-standing app on the App Store, and it’s recently been updated with a Liquid Glass design and new features. more…
articles.title_zh: 獨立應用聚焦：'QuakeInfo' 是監測地震的快速簡便方式
articles.summary_zh: QuakeInfo 是本週的獨立應用介紹，為居住在地震高風險地區的用戶提供地震監測工具。

articles.title: Apple’s upcoming AirPods Pro 3 variant could debut a groundbreaking new feature
articles.summary: Earlier this year, Apple acquired a secretive startup : Q.ai, for over 2 billion dollars. It’s the companies second largest acquisition to date, and it leaves you wondering: what’s the end game here? While smart glasses seem like an obvious play, there’s another Apple product in the pipeline that also seems quite fitting for this new technology. more…
articles.title_zh: Apple 即將推出的 AirPods Pro 3 變款可能會首次推出革命性新功能
articles.summary_zh: Apple 斥資超過 20 億美元收購了神祕新創公司 Q.ai，這筆收購可能與 AirPods Pro 3 的新功能有關。

articles.title: Security Bite: ClickFix malware authors already bypassing Apple’s new Terminal paste warning
articles.summary: 9to5Mac Security Bite is exclusively brought to you by Mosyle, the only Apple Unified Platform . Making Apple devices work-ready and enterprise-safe is all we do. Our unique integrated approach to management and security combines state-of-the-art Apple-specific security solutions for fully automated Hardening & Compliance, Next Generation EDR, AI-powered Zero Trust, and exclusive Privilege Management with the most powerful and modern Apple MDM on the market. The result is a totally automated Apple Unified Platform currently trusted by over 45,000 organizations to make millions of Apple devices work-ready with no effort and at an affordable cost. Request your EXTENDED TRIAL today and understand why Mosyle is everything you need to work with Apple . As you may know, a couple weeks ago on
articles.title_zh: 安全快訊：ClickFix 惡意軟體作者已繞過 Apple 的 Terminal 貼上警告
articles.summary_zh: ClickFix 惡意軟體已開始繞過 Apple 新推出的 Terminal 貼上警告功能。

articles.title: Gemini app bug removes features, reverts UI on Android
articles.summary: A bug with the Gemini app today is responsible for several recent features being rolled back. more…
articles.title_zh: Gemini 應用程式出現漏洞，移除功能並在 Android 上還原使用者介面
articles.summary_zh: Gemini 應用程式的一個漏洞導致多項最近的功能被回滾。

articles.title: What is happening with the Google Assistant? [Video]
articles.summary: After just over a decade, the Google Assistant is entering end-of-life, but what does that mean for the millions of us who have used it for so long? And what is next for the platform? more…
articles.title_zh: Google Assistant 發生什麼事了？【影片】
articles.summary_zh: 在服役超過十年後，Google Assistant 即將停止維護，將對數百萬使用者產生影響。

articles.title: Samsung says Galaxy S26 vertical camera is a ‘core identity’ — it’s also a core problem
articles.summary: In a recent interview, Samsung execs discussed how the company’s design language has evolved into what we now know as the Galaxy S26. While it might be true that Samsung has carved out its own identity in the mobile space through generations of refinement, that same design is also at the heart of some of the most annoying-yet-fixable problems facing Galaxy hardware. more…
articles.title_zh: Samsung 稱 Galaxy S26 垂直相機是「核心特徵」——也是核心問題
articles.summary_zh: Samsung 高管在訪談中討論了 Galaxy S26 的設計語言演變，但該設計也成為了核心問題。

articles.title: Amazon’s new Fire TV Stick HD signals the end of sideloading
articles.summary: Credit: Amazon TL;DR The new Fire TV Stick HD is the second Amazon streaming stick to launch with Vega OS. Some customers looking to buy the device are being warned that they won’t be able to sideload apps. Amazon has also announced that it will continue to support a majority of Fire TV streaming sticks and cubes until 2030. A few days ago, Amazon announced the new Fire TV Stick HD . This will be the company’s second streaming stick with Vega OS , Amazon’s new Linux-based operating system. As the device ditches Fire OS, a forked version of Android, there are some concerns about app support and sideloading. It appears the company is trying to get ahead of the issue by issuing warnings to customers. Amazon is also extending support for a wide range of Fire TV products. Don’t want to miss the
articles.title_zh: Amazon 新 Fire TV Stick HD 預示側載的終結
articles.summary_zh: 新 Fire TV Stick HD 搭載 Vega OS，部分購買者將無法進行應用側載。

articles.title: Weekly poll results: the vivo X300 Ultra is a great phone for those who can afford it
articles.summary: Earlier this week, vivo announced the start of the global rollout of the X300 Ultra and X300 FE with the exact date depending on the market – it’s April 24 for Spain, for example. Also, the X300 Ultra is now up on Amazon with an eye-watering price tag of €2,000 (16GB/1TB). Based on the results from last week’s poll, the vivo X300 Ultra will be one of the main challengers in the upcoming Ultra battle. The phone received a very warm welcome with one caveat – people are curious about the Oppo Find X9 Ultra, which will go global on April 21. The vivo X300 Pro didn’t offer much challenge,...
articles.title_zh: 每週投票結果：vivo X300 Ultra 是能負擔的用戶的絕佳手機
articles.summary_zh: vivo 宣佈全球推出 X300 Ultra 和 X300 FE，X300 Ultra 在 Amazon 上的售價為 €2,000。

articles.title: Motorola will allow even more users to try out the new Android 17 beta this year
articles.summary: With Google releasing the first Android 17 beta version in February, it's now smartphone manufacturers' turn to kickstart their beta programs. Motorola was one of the first to jump on the bandwagon and is doing so with a longer list of devices compared to last year. In addition to the Motorola Edge (2025), Moto G57 and Moto G57 Power, the list of all Motorola devices has been updated with several new devices. Here they are: Motorola Razr+ (2025) [USA] Motorola Razr+ (2024) [USA] Motorola Razr 50 Ultra [India] Motorola Razr 50 Ultra [EMEA] Motorola Razr 50 Ultra...
articles.title_zh: Motorola 將允許更多用戶在今年試用新 Android 17 測試版
articles.summary_zh: Google 於 2 月發佈 Android 17 測試版後，Motorola 開啟測試計畫並支援更多裝置。

articles.title: OnePlus Buds Ace 3 key specs and images surface online
articles.summary: OnePlus is expected to launch its budget-friendly TWS buds called Buds Ace 3 sometime this month, succeeding the Buds Ace 2 that debuted in late 2024. So in a sense, the Buds Ace 3 are a bit overdue. OnePlus Buds Ace 3 Ahead of the near release, OnePlus teased the headphones on Weibo, revealing key details and a press render. The headphones are also up on the Chinese Oppo online store, confirming the imminent launch. It looks like the Ace 3 brings the most upgrades in two departments - battery life and noise cancellation capabilities. The new buds are rated at up to 55 dB of...
articles.title_zh: OnePlus Buds Ace 3 主要規格和圖片曝光
articles.summary_zh: OnePlus 預計本月推出預算友善的 Buds Ace 3，繼承自 Buds Ace 2。

articles.title: Oppo Find X9s spotted on Geekbench running Dimensity 9500s
articles.summary: The Oppo Find X9 Ultra is about to debut globally on April 21, but it won't come alone. Oppo's top-end handset will be joined by the Oppo Find X9s, adding to the global Find X9 series. Ahead of the release, the Find X9s popped up in a Geekbench 6 listing online showing off a Dimensity 9500s chipset, which is a toned-down version of the full-fledged Dimensity 9500 SoC. The Find X9s Pro, which is also expected to debut globally, runs on the latter chip. We already know what to expect from the chipset, given that the Poco X8 Pro Max we reviewed recently is powered by the same...
articles.title_zh: Oppo Find X9s 現身 Geekbench 搭載 Dimensity 9500s 晶片
articles.summary_zh: Oppo Find X9s 即將全球發佈，搭載 Dimensity 9500s 晶片，將與 Find X9 Ultra 一同推出。

articles.title: ★ ‘A Reading Room on Wheels, a Lover’s Lane, and, After 11 PM, a Flophouse’
articles.summary: Photos from the New York Subway in the 1940s, by teenage Stanley Kubrick.
articles.title_zh: ★ 『輪子上的閱讀室，情人巷，以及晚上 11 點以後的臨時宿舍』
articles.summary_zh: 來自青少年 Stanley Kubrick 於 1940 年代拍攝的紐約地鐵照片。

articles.title: Mac Mini and Mac Studio Supply Shortages
articles.title_zh: Mac Mini 和 Mac Studio 供應短缺

articles.title: Tesla brings its robotaxi service to Dallas and Houston
articles.summary: The company now offers robotaxi service in three cities, all of them in Texas, after launching in Austin last year and starting to offer rides without safety drivers in January 2026.
articles.title_zh: Tesla 將其機器人計程車服務擴展至達拉斯和休斯頓
articles.summary_zh: 該公司現已在德州三個城市提供機器人計程車服務，去年在奧斯汀推出，並於2026年1月開始提供無安全駕駛員的乘車服務。

articles.title: AI chip startup Cerebras files for IPO
articles.summary: In recent months, the company announced an agreement with Amazon Web Services to use Cerebras chips in Amazon data centers, as well as a deal with OpenAI reportedly worth more than $10 billion.
articles.title_zh: AI 晶片新創公司 Cerebras 申請 IPO
articles.summary_zh: 該公司近期宣佈與 Amazon Web Services 達成協議在亞馬遜資料中心使用 Cerebras 晶片，並與 OpenAI 簽署據報價值超過 100 億美元的合作協議。

articles.title: Anthropic’s relationship with the Trump administration seems to be thawing
articles.summary: Despite recently being designated a supply-chain risk by the Pentagon, Anthropic is still talking to high-level members of the Trump administration.
articles.title_zh: Anthropic 與川普政府的關係似乎在緩和
articles.summary_zh: 儘管最近被五角大廈指定為供應鏈風險，Anthropic 仍在與川普政府的高級官員保持溝通。

articles.title: Anthropic, OpenAI, Google, and Microsoft agree that the harness is the product. They disagree on the price.
articles.summary: On March 30, Sycamore announced a $65 million seed round to build what its founder calls an operating system for autonomous enterprise AI. On April 8, Anthropic launched Managed Agents in public beta at eight cents per session hour. Seven days later, OpenAI  shipped  its own model-native harness as an update to the open-source Agents SDK, with no additional first-party runtime fee beyond standard API and tool pricing. Three moves in sixteen days, each betting on the same observation about the market. The harness is now the product. But the labs disagree, sharply and publicly, on how that product should be sold. Anthropic has added a separately billed runtime on its own infrastructure. Google and Microsoft have packaged the layer for consumption across sessions, memory, code execu
articles.title_zh: Anthropic、OpenAI、Google 和 Microsoft 同意 harness 是產品，但對價格有分歧
articles.summary_zh: Sycamore 宣布獲得 6,500 萬美元種子輪融資以構建自主企業 AI 作業系統，Anthropic 推出 Managed Agents 公測版本（每會話小時收費八美分），OpenAI 隨後推出其模型原生解決方案。

articles.title: Aevex CEO Speaks on Raising $320 Million in US IPO
articles.summary: Aevex CEO Roger Wells speaks on IPO and company direction on Bloomberg Technology. (Source: Bloomberg)

articles.summary_zh: Aevex執行長Roger Wells在Bloomberg Technology節目中就IPO和公司發展方向發表看法。

articles.title: CEO Jill Wyant Speaks on Madison Air IPO
articles.summary: Jill Wyant speaks with Ed Ludlow on how Madison Air pulled off the largest industrial IPO since 1999. (Source: Bloomberg)
articles.title_zh: 執行長Jill Wyant談Madison Air IPO
articles.summary_zh: Jill Wyant與Ed Ludlow討論Madison Air如何完成自1999年以來最大規模的工業IPO。

articles.title: New Documentary Traces the Origins of Bitcoin, Searches for Satoshi
articles.summary: Investigative journalist and Puck founding partner William D. Cohan and Quest Research and Investigations co-founder Tyler Maroney join David Gura and Christina Ruffini on Bloomberg This Weekend to discuss 'Finding Satoshi', a new documentary that chronicles their four-year investigation into the origins of Satoshi Nakamoto, the pseudonymous creator of Bitcoin, whose identity remains secret. (Source: Bloomberg)
articles.title_zh: 新紀錄片追溯Bitcoin起源，尋找Satoshi
articles.summary_zh: 調查記者兼Puck創始合作夥伴William D. Cohan和Quest Research and Investigations聯合創辦人Tyler Maroney在Bloomberg This Weekend節目中討論紀錄片《Finding Satoshi》，該片記錄了他們四年來對Bitcoin起源的調查。

articles.summary: 一項發表於《科學進展》（Science Advances）上的新研究證實了一個正在不斷演化的多行星系統 TOI […]
articles.title_zh: TOI-201 多行星系統現形，超級地球、暖木星與棕矮星揭開行星演化新線索
articles.summary_zh: 一項發表於《科學進展》（Science Advances）上的新研究證實了一個正在不斷演化的多行星系統 TOI […]

articles.title: Russian-made Shahed drones are ‘disintegrating in the air before reaching their targets’ due to shoddy manufacturing, video shows — commentators call Russian clones of Iran's drones 'flying garbage'
articles.summary: Video footage captured by Ukrainian Sting interceptor drones shows that Russia’s endless drone assault is now powered by what some commenters have described as ‘flying garbage.’
articles.title_zh: 俄製 Shahed 無人機因製造品質低劣而「在到達目標前在空中解體」，影片顯示——評論者稱俄製伊朗無人機複製品為「飛行垃圾」
articles.summary_zh: 烏克蘭 Sting 攔截無人機拍攝的影片顯示，俄羅斯無休止的無人機襲擊現已由一些評論者所稱的「飛行垃圾」驅動。

articles.title: Bambu Lab overtakes Creality as the world's top-selling budget 3D printer brand — resurgence in 3D printer market fueled by budget options
articles.summary: Bambu Lab claimed the top spot in global entry-level 3D printer shipments during 2025, overtaking longtime leader Creality.
articles.title_zh: Bambu Lab 超越 Creality 成為全球頂級預算 3D 列印機品牌——預算選項推動 3D 列印機市場復甦
articles.summary_zh: Bambu Lab 在 2025 年全球入門級 3D 列印機出貨量中奪得首位，超越了長期領先的 Creality。

articles.title: Inventor showcases 3D printer filament dryer that mines Bitcoins and dries filament with waste heat, capable of 6 TH/s at 140W — joins Bitcoin-mining 3D printer in hobbyist-focused miner lineup
articles.summary: An inventor has showcased a 3D printer filament dryer 'that pays you bitcoin.'
articles.title_zh: 發明家展示 3D 列印機耗材乾燥器，可開採比特幣並利用廢熱乾燥耗材，功率 140W 可達 6 TH/s——加入比特幣挖礦 3D 列印機的愛好者礦工陣容
articles.summary_zh: 一位發明家展示了一款 3D 列印機耗材乾燥器「可為您賺取比特幣」。

articles.title: 40 years ago we entered the megabit memory era with IBM’s DRAM breakthrough — a major leap beyond the 64 kilobit chips common at the time
articles.summary: 40 years ago today IBM was in the news for becoming the first computer company with 1-megabit memory chips.
articles.title_zh: 40 年前我們進入兆位元記憶體時代，IBM DRAM 重大突破——遠超當時常見的 64 千位元晶片
articles.summary_zh: 40 年前的今天，IBM 因開發出首款 1 兆位元記憶體晶片而成為新聞焦點。

articles.title: Sudokoo SK620V and SK700V Review: Silent, Stylish AM5 cooling, with a built-in display
articles.summary: We tested Sudokoo’s unique SK-series air coolers on the Ryzen 9 9950X3D. Read the full review to see how they deliver big performance without annoying noise levels.
articles.title_zh: Sudokoo SK620V 和 SK700V 評測：靜音、時尚的 AM5 散熱，配備內置顯示屏
articles.summary_zh: 我們在 Ryzen 9 9950X3D 上測試了 Sudokoo 獨特的 SK 系列空氣散熱器，閱讀完整評測瞭解它們如何在不產生惱人噪音的情況下提供出色性能。

articles.title: Researchers find a way to heat 3D printer filament using microwaves, enabling fusing circuits inside printed objects — tech supports precise heating down to the width of a human hair
articles.summary: Researchers from Rice University have developed new microwave technology giving 3D printers the ability to heat ink with extremely high precision. The new tech is already being used to develop new 3D-printed tech that would be impossible without it, and to improve 3D printing efficiency.
articles.title_zh: 研究人員發現用微波加熱 3D 列印機耗材的方法，可在列印物件內部融合電路——技術支援精確加熱至人類頭髮寬度
articles.summary_zh: 來自萊斯大學的研究人員開發了新型微波技術，使 3D 列印機能夠以極高精度加熱墨水。該新技術已被用於開發過去不可能的新型 3D 列印技術，並提高 3D 列印效率。

articles.title: New HUDIMM memory specification debuts with goal of slashing DDR5 prices during RAM shortages — A new, cheaper memory standard with half the bandwidth and half the capacity
articles.summary: DDR5 RAM usually has 2x 32-bit subchannels (single rank), which requires more ICs to populate a 64-bit wide bus. ASRock's new HUDIMM has just 1x 32-bit channel and can work with standard DDR5 in mix-and-matched configs as well. HUDIMM sticks are being made by TeamGroup and are supported on most LGA 1700 ASRock motherboards.
articles.title_zh: 新 HUDIMM 記憶體規格亮相，目標為在 RAM 短缺期間大幅降低 DDR5 價格——頻寬和容量均為一半的更便宜記憶體標準
articles.summary_zh: DDR5 RAM 通常具有 2 個 32 位元子通道（單排），需要更多 IC 填充 64 位元寬匯流排。ASRock 新型 HUDIMM 僅有 1 個 32 位元通道，可與標準 DDR5 混合搭配使用。

articles.title: New flat M.2 SSD adapter doesn't stick out from the motherboard, unlocking PCIe slots hidden under massive GPUs — JEYI's new 'ArcherX' AIC lays completely flush and supports PCIe 4.0 speeds
articles.summary: JEYI's new PCIe to M.2 adapter is flat and sits flush with the motherboard when installed in a PCIe slot. It basically takes up no perpendicular space, allowing an SSD to be installed even in tight spaces where the GPU is often blocking the area. The adapter features PCIe 4.0 speeds and is backwards compatible with PCIe 3.0 as well.
articles.title_zh: 新型平坦 M.2 SSD 轉接卡不從主機板凸出，解鎖大型 GPU 下隱藏的 PCIe 插槽——JEYI 新款 ArcherX AIC 完全平貼並支援 PCIe 4.0 速度
articles.summary_zh: JEYI 的新型 PCIe 至 M.2 轉接卡設計平坦，安裝在 PCIe 插槽時與主機板齊平。它基本不佔用垂直空間，即使在 GPU 經常阻擋的狹窄空間中也能安裝 SSD。該轉接卡支援 PCIe 4.0 速度。

articles.title: Xbox Series X|S storage expansion cards can be used on PC with an inexpensive CFexpress adapter — Speeds top out at 1,560 MB/s in Redditor's testing
articles.summary: You can use Xbox Expansion Cards on PC with a CFexpress adapter since these cards use a standard CFexpress Type-B connector. There are various options available such as PCIe to CFexpress or M.2 to CFexpress, and all of them are inexpensive. You just need to format the Expansion Card before it's useable, but don't expect blazing-fast speeds afterward.
articles.title_zh: Xbox Series X|S 儲存擴充卡可搭配廉價 CFexpress 轉接卡在 PC 上使用——速度在 Redditor 測試中達到 1,560 MB/s
articles.summary_zh: 由於 Xbox 擴充卡使用標準 CFexpress Type-B 連接器，您可以搭配 CFexpress 轉接卡在 PC 上使用。有多種選項可用，如 PCIe 至 CFexpress 或 M.2 至 CFexpress，且價格均廉價。您只需在使用前格式化擴充卡。

articles.title: Toshiba refuses to replace large hard drive that was under warranty — company offers refund at the purchase price, not the higher current retail price
articles.summary: Toshiba said that it can only offer a refund at the original cost for a broken hard drive, as replacing it would take over a year. The user expressed disappointment over the move, as they'll have to spend significantly more than they'll get back in the refund due to chip shortages.
articles.title_zh: 東芝拒絕更換在保修期內的大容量硬碟——公司按購買價格而非更高的當前零售價提供退款
articles.summary_zh: 東芝表示，由於更換故障硬碟需時超過一年，只能按原價提供退款。用戶對此舉感到失望，因為由於晶片短缺，他們必須花費遠超退款金額的費用。

articles.title: $20,000 in 32GB RAM sticks saved from the dumpster are now worth a fortune — seventy-two DDR4-2666 ECC RDIMMs were about to turn into e-waste
articles.summary: A Redditor's dad saved 72 32GB HPE DDR4-2666 RDIMMs that were headed for the trash heap after their company upgraded their brand-new servers.
articles.title_zh: $20,000 的 32GB RAM 記憶體條從垃圾堆中搶救，現已身價倍增——七十二條 DDR4-2666 ECC RDIMM 險些淪為電子廢棄物
articles.summary_zh: 一位 Redditor 的父親搶救了 72 條 HPE DDR4-2666 RDIMM 記憶體條，這些條子在公司升級全新伺服器後本來要被丟棄。

articles.title: Apple’s major MacBook Pro overhaul is reportedly ‘slightly’ delayed due to supply chain shortages
articles.summary: A lot of us are impatiently awaiting the next-generation of MacBook Pro, which is expected to feature a bevy of updates including a new OLED display with Dynamic Island cutout, a touch screen a la iPad and iPhone, and the more powerful M6 Pro and M6 Max chip. Bloomberg’s Mark Gurman is today reporting in his newsletter that Apple is facing some production issues due to the industry-wide memory shortages. Supply constraints mean that the MacBook Pro launch is slightly delayed, and possibly won’t arrive until early next year. more…
articles.title_zh: Apple 的重大 MacBook Pro 改版據報因供應鏈短缺而略微延遲
articles.summary_zh: 下一代 MacBook Pro 預計將搭載新 OLED 螢幕、Dynamic Island 切口設計和更強大的 M6 Pro 及 M6 Max 晶片，但因供應鏈問題而略微延遲。

articles.title: New Mac Studio may not arrive until October
articles.summary: In the latest edition of Mark Gurman’s Bloomberg newsletter , he reports that the new generation of Mac Studio may not arrive until October. The current Mac Studio is offered in M3 Ultra and M4 Max configurations, albeit with long shipping delays and several models now completely out of stock . A refresh is certainly due. However, supply chain constraints are apparently impacting Apple’s ability to deliver the (likely M5-powered) Mac Studio update. Gurman says that Apple had been aiming for a release around the middle of the year, but now that has been pushed back several months. more…
articles.title_zh: 新款 Mac Studio 可能要到 10 月才會推出
articles.summary_zh: 根據 Mark Gurman 的報導，新一代 Mac Studio 可能延至 10 月才推出，目前 Mac Studio 存在長時間交貨延遲和缺貨情況。

articles.title: Postponed Apple TV series ‘The Savant’ will finally be released this summer
articles.summary: The Jessica Chastain thriller series, The Savant , was originally set to air on Apple TV last September. However, the company decided to cancel the release at the eleventh hour. Star Jessica Chastain said she was ‘not aligned’ with Apple on the decision. As months passed, many doubted if the series would ever make it to air. But finally, Chastain herself confirmed to Variety that “we’re going to see it”. Variety indicates that Apple is targeting a July release date, although that is not yet officially confirmed. more…
articles.title_zh: 延期的 Apple TV 劇集《The Savant》將於今夏推出
articles.summary_zh: 由 Jessica Chastain 主演的驚悚劇集《The Savant》原定去年 9 月在 Apple TV 播映，但遭臨時取消，現終於將在今夏推出。

articles.title: Three years later, 200MP cameras finally live up to the hype
articles.summary: Credit: Hadlee Simons / Android Authority Samsung was one of the first manufacturers to offer a 200MP camera when it launched the Galaxy S23 Ultra back in 2023. We’ve since seen many other brands adopt this tech for use on both primary and telephoto cameras. We haven’t seen a major change in the sensor size of 200MP cameras, though. Until now, that is. The vivo X300 Ultra has just been released, and it offers a significantly larger 200MP main camera. But how does this fare in practice compared to the first-generation 200MP main camera on the Galaxy S23 Ultra? I put these two phones to the test in a 200MP camera shootout.
articles.title_zh: 三年後，200MP 相機終於名副其實
articles.summary_zh: 自 Samsung Galaxy S23 Ultra 在 2023 年推出 200MP 相機後，許多品牌開始採用此技術，現在這些相機終於達到預期的效能。

articles.title: This $10 accessory has completely transformed my Pixel 10
articles.summary: One of the things I love most about my Pixel 10 Pro is Pixelsnap. Having magnets built into the back, rather than relying on cases, is perfect for how I use my phone. I use the magnets to attach my Pixel to wall mounts, chargers, battery packs, and more. Recently, I bought something I didn’t expect to like as much as I do, and it’s become my favorite Pixel 10 accessory.
articles.title_zh: 這個 10 美元的配件徹底改變了我的 Pixel 10 體驗
articles.summary_zh: Pixel 10 Pro 內建的磁性固定系統讓使用者能輕鬆將手機附著在各種支架和充電器上，大幅提升使用體驗。

articles.title: I love the Galaxy S26 Ultra, but it still can’t beat this Android phone from 2025
articles.summary: Every year, Samsung drops a new Galaxy Ultra, and somehow, it still feels like the same familiar formula with a few refinements. The Samsung Galaxy S26 Ultra is no exception. It’s polished and powerful, sure, but not quite the kind of upgrade that makes you fall in love with it right away. That said, this year does bring one excellent addition: the Privacy Display . It’s a feature that changes how I use my phone in public, and honestly, it’s something I want on every Android I use, including my favorite phone from last year: the OPPO Find X9 Pro. Still, a single standout feature doesn’t completely shift the value equation at a $1,300 starting price.
articles.title_zh: 我喜歡 Galaxy S26 Ultra，但它仍敵不過這款 2025 年的 Android 手機
articles.summary_zh: 雖然 Galaxy S26 Ultra 精良強大，但其升級改進不足以讓使用者立即愛上，與某些 2025 年的 Android 手機相比仍有差距。

articles.title: I’ve tested tons of projectors — here’s what they don’t tell you about brightness levels
articles.summary: What used to feel like a niche category for home theater diehards is now pushing into everyday spaces, with portable models, lifestyle designs, and ultra-short-throw setups doubling as TV replacements. Along the way, one spec in particular keeps climbing: brightness. On paper, more lumens should mean a better, more usable image — especially in a room that isn’t perfectly dark. But for most people, once you’re past a certain baseline, the jump from pretty bright to extremely bright doesn’t change the experience nearly as much as the numbers suggest.
articles.title_zh: 我測試過許多投影機——以下是廠商未告訴你的亮度相關事項
articles.summary_zh: 投影機從專業愛好者設備演進為日常消費品，亮度規格持續提升，但紙面上的流明數不一定能轉化為實際效果。

articles.title: I don’t want to use YouTube Music, even though I pay for it
articles.summary: Credit: Joe Maring / Android Authority A few months ago, Google and YouTube realized that I no longer lived in Lebanon and told me I couldn’t skate on paying just $9 per month for a Lebanese family Premium account. I had to face the music and switch to a two-person French Premium subscription for €19.99 per month instead — more than double what I was initially paying. Of course, this made me wonder whether it was worth it, but also whether I wanted to keep paying for Spotify Duo, too, which had been my music streaming service of choice for over 18 years . But considering the included YouTube Music access in my now very expensive Premium subscription, I had to ask myself the question. And the answer, as I soon realized, was very easy: I just don’t want to use YouTube Music, even for “free.”
articles.title_zh: 我不想使用 YouTube Music，儘管我已付費
articles.summary_zh: 使用者因地區變更被迫升級 YouTube Music 訂閱方案，從低價的黎巴嫩家庭方案改為更昂貴的法國雙人訂閱。

articles.title: After over a decade with Android tablets, I’ve left for the iPad
articles.summary: Credit: Rita El Khoury / Android Authority While iPad might be the obvious leader in the tablet space, I’ve never been a big fan. While we did own a second-gen iPad for a few years, I eventually switched exclusively to Android tablets . Going back as far as Android Honeycomb, I’ve experienced tablets from numerous brands, including ASUS, NVIDIA, and Samsung. I’ll admit that much of the draw has been value proposition, but I also truly enjoy the flexibility Android brings that you just won’t find with iPad OS. Unfortunately, the range of hardware is a whole other story. Over the last several years, the Android tablet market has shrunk considerably.
articles.title_zh: 使用 Android 平板超過十年後，我轉向了 iPad
articles.summary_zh: 一位長期使用 Android 平板的使用者最終改用 iPad，儘管曾因不滿而放棄使用多年，現已認可 iPad 的領先地位。

articles.title: Samsung Galaxy A53 and Galaxy A55 receive April 2026 security update
articles.summary: Samsung has released the April 2026 security patch for the Galaxy A53 and Galaxy A55. The April 2026 security patch for the Galaxy A53 comes with the update having firmware version A536NKSSGGZD1 and is currently available in South Korea. Samsung Galaxy A55 The Galaxy A55, on the other hand, is receiving the April 2026 security patch with an update having firmware version A556EXXSECZD1. It's currently rolling out in India. If you haven't received the security update on your Galaxy A53 or Galaxy A55 yet, you can check for it manually by navigating to your phone's Settings >...
articles.title_zh: Samsung Galaxy A53 和 Galaxy A55 獲得 2026 年 4 月安全更新
articles.summary_zh: Samsung 已為 Galaxy A53 和 Galaxy A55 釋出 2026 年 4 月安全補丁，目前已在南韓推送。

articles.title: Weekly deals: vivo X300 Ultra arrives, X300 and X300 Pro on sale, iPhone Air also discounted
articles.summary: While you can’t have it just yet, the vivo X300 Ultra is now available in Europe and the first units should ship out in about a week. This will be one of the top camera phones of the year – we have a review unit that we’re currently testing and it looks very promising. The phone is a beast with a 200MP (1/1.12”) main camera with a 35mm ZEISS lens, another 200MP sensor (1/1.4”) inside the 3.7x/85mm periscope, plus a 50MP ultra-wide (116°) and a 50MP selfie. It has a large 6.82” 1440p+ LTPO display, a 6,400mAh battery with 100W wired and 40W wireless charging and it is powered by the...
articles.title_zh: 每週優惠：vivo X300 Ultra 上市，X300 和 X300 Pro 開始折扣，iPhone Air 也有優惠
articles.summary_zh: vivo X300 Ultra 現已在歐洲推出並將在一週內開始出貨，其強大的相機功能將成為今年最佳拍照手機之選。

articles.title: Weekly poll: would you buy a Poco X8 Pro or a Poco X8 Pro Max?
articles.summary: Prices are rising across the board, which could lead some to pick up a mid-range or a flagship killer phone instead of a premium flagship. If that’s you, are you looking at the Poco X8 Pro or X8 Pro Max as your next phone? Poco X8 Pro and X8 Pro Max at a glance The Poco X8 Pro Max has a lot going for it with a Dimensity 9500s chipset (a derivative of the 9400 chip), a huge 8,500mAh battery with chart-topping endurance and fast charging, a great 6.83” display (12-bit, Dolby Vision), a decent camera and a few goodies like an ultrasonic fingerprint reader. We heaped a lot of...
articles.title_zh: 每週問卷：你會購買 Poco X8 Pro 或 Poco X8 Pro Max？
articles.summary_zh: 隨著手機價格全面上漲，消費者可能傾向於選擇中階或性價比旗艦機型，Poco X8 Pro 和 X8 Pro Max 成為熱門選擇。

articles.title: Samsung to retire old LPDDR4 RAM and move production to LPDDR5
articles.summary: Reports from people familiar with the DRAM market say that Samsung is accepting last orders for the LPDDR4 and LPDDR4X memory chips. Production will likely continue throughout 2026 in order to fulfill all orders. Once LPDDR4 and LPDDR4X modules are phased out, Samsung will convert the existing production lines to LPDDR5 manufacturing in the first quarter of 2027. It's no surprise that Samsung is shifting its efforts toward the newer DRAM generation, given the memory semiconductor supercycle that's upon us. This will secure Samsung higher revenue in the coming year as DRAM prices...
articles.title_zh: Samsung 將停用舊款 LPDDR4 記憶體並轉向 LPDDR5 生產
articles.summary_zh: Samsung 正接受 LPDDR4 和 LPDDR4X 記憶體晶片的最後訂單，2026 年完成訂單履行後將逐步淘汰並轉向 LPDDR5 生產。

articles.title: SmartBear’s Swagger update targets the API drift problem AI coding tools created
articles.summary: Last week, SmartBear announced new capabilities for its commercial Swagger toolset designed to help organizations govern, validate, and scale APIs as AI coding tools accelerate software development. The updates center on two additions: A revamped Swagger Catalog that gives platform teams centralized visibility into API portfolios, and contract testing with drift detection that continuously verifies API behavior matches OpenAPI specifications. Swagger enables design, governance, and testing across the full AI-enabled API lifecycle, ensuring quality at every step, SmartBear says. It enables users to build APIs ready for humans, LLMs, agents, and continuous innovation. AI is writing code faster than specs can follow The company is pitching both new additions under the banner of “applica
articles.title_zh: SmartBear 的 Swagger 更新針對 AI 編程工具造成的 API 漂移問題
articles.summary_zh: SmartBear 宣佈為其商業 Swagger 工具集推出新功能，幫助組織在 AI 編程工具加速軟體開發時管理、驗證和擴展 API。更新包括改進的 Swagger Catalog，為平台團隊提供集中式管理功能。

articles.title: Best Meta Glasses (2026): Ray-Ban, Oakley, AR
articles.summary: Meta is unquestionably winning the face-wearable war. Can you trust the company? Maybe not. But these are some of the nicest glasses I've ever worn.
articles.title_zh: 最佳 Meta 眼鏡 (2026)：Ray-Ban、Oakley、AR
articles.summary_zh: Meta 在面部穿戴設備領域無疑是贏家，這些是作者曾佩戴過最舒適的眼鏡。

articles.title: Hisense U7SG TV Review (2026): Better Design, Great Value
articles.summary: Hisense’s midrange U7 TV gets some high-end upgrades, but the competition is only getting stiffer.
articles.title_zh: Hisense U7SG 電視評測 (2026)：設計更優、物超所值
articles.summary_zh: Hisense 中端 U7 電視獲得高端升級，但競爭也日益激烈。

articles.title: The 11 Best Fans to Buy Before It Gets Hot Again (2026)
articles.summary: Swap out your creaky old box fan for a new model that lights up, mists, or even follows you around the room.
articles.title_zh: 2026 年最佳風扇選購指南：11 款推薦產品
articles.summary_zh: 用新款風扇替換陳舊的老款，享受炫彩、霧化甚至跟隨移動的功能。

articles.title: Our Favorite Apple Watch Has Never Been Less Expensive
articles.summary: Our top Apple Watch recommendation fluctuates in price. If you're in the market, now's a good time to buy.
articles.title_zh: 我們最愛的 Apple Watch 價格從未如此便宜
articles.summary_zh: 我們最推薦的 Apple Watch 價格波動頻繁，現在是購買的好時機。

articles.title: The 10 Best Pet Cameras of 2026: Furbo, Petcube, and Enabot
articles.summary: Whether you’re near or far, keep an eye on your fur baby with our favorite pet cameras.
articles.title_zh: 2026 年 10 款最佳寵物攝像機：Furbo、Petcube 和 Enabot
articles.summary_zh: 無論身在何處，都能用我們推薦的寵物攝像機照看您的毛茸茸朋友。

articles.title: Apple’s Revamped Siri Interface in iOS 27 Is Hidden in WWDC Teaser
articles.summary: Also: Memory shortages could push back new Macs.
articles.title_zh: Apple iOS 27 重新設計的 Siri 界面隱藏在 WWDC 預告片中
articles.summary_zh: 另外，記憶體短缺可能推遲新款 Mac 的發布。

articles.title: How the AI Boom is Fueling the US Copper Race
articles.summary: As demand for electricity surges in the age of artificial intelligence, copper has become a critical input for everything from data centers to power grids. But US production has stagnated for decades, leaving the country increasingly reliant on imports even as global demand accelerates. In Arizona, projects like Rio Tinto’s Resolution mine highlight both the scale of untapped domestic resources and the challenges of bringing new supply online, from regulatory delays to rising costs. With China dominating processing and global competition intensifying, industry leaders and analysts warn that rebuilding US copper capacity is not just an economic priority, but a strategic one. (Source: Bloomberg)
articles.title_zh: AI 熱潮如何推動美國銅業競爭
articles.summary_zh: 隨著 AI 時代電力需求激增，銅成為數據中心和電網等基礎設施的關鍵輸入，但美國產量停滯數十年，進口依賴不斷增加。

articles.title: Crypto Hack Worth $290 Million Triggers DeFi Contagion Shock
articles.summary: Hackers exploited a cross-chain bridge on Saturday, draining nearly $300 million from a key piece of decentralized finance infrastructure and setting off a ripple effect across multiple crypto platforms.
articles.title_zh: 價值 2.9 億美元的加密貨幣黑客攻擊引發 DeFi 連鎖反應
articles.summary_zh: 黑客週六利用跨鏈橋接漏洞盜取近 3 億美元資金，對多個加密平台造成連鎖衝擊。

articles.title: I’ve fired one of America’s most powerful lasers—here’s what a shot day looks like
articles.summary: If you walk across the open yard in front of the Physics, Math, and Astronomy building at the University of Texas at Austin , you’ll see a 17-story tower and a huge L-shaped building. What you won’t see is what’s underneath you. Two floors below ground, behind heavy double doors stamped with a logo that most students have never noticed, sits one of the most powerful lasers in the United States. I was the lead laser scientist on the Texas Petawatt , or TPW as we called it, from 2020 to 2024. Texas Petawatt, which is currently closed due to funding cuts, was a government-funded research center where scientists from across the country applied for time to use specialized equipment. It was part of LaserNetUS , a Department of Energy network of high-power laser labs. This type of laser takes a t
articles.title_zh: 我操作過美國最強大的激光—工作日是這樣的
articles.summary_zh: 在德州大學奧斯汀分校物理、數學和天文樓前的開放院子裡，您會看到一座 17 層高塔和巨大的 L 形建築，但看不到地下的秘密。
